failure_modes.mode: Coil blockage due to solid precipitation
failure_modes.cause: DES crystallization at cooling zones or product precipitation in 16m coil
failure_modes.mitigation: Heat trace entire coil length and implement inline filtration

failure_modes.mode: Pump failure at ultra-low flow rate
failure_modes.cause: HPLC pump instability at Q=0.059 mL/min leading to flow pulsation
failure_modes.mitigation: Use syringe pump or add pulse dampener with flow verification

failure_modes.mode: Thermal runaway in long residence coil
failure_modes.cause: Exothermic side reactions accumulating heat over 16m length at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Segment coil with temperature monitoring every 4m

single_points_of_failure: Single pump failure at critical low flow
validation_experiments: Run DES blank at 120°C for 2 hours through full coil; monitor pressure for blockage indicators
Test pump stability at Q=0.059 mL/min for 4 hours; measure flow deviation >±10%
Thermal mapping of coil at reaction conditions with thermocouples every 2m
